caption: The video captures a scene from MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. A man in a suit is being interviewed by a reporter whose hand is visible holding a microphone. The background shows a bustling environment with several people walking and interacting, indicating a lively conference atmosphere. The man appears to be speaking thoughtfully, possibly discussing topics related to MongoDB or the event itself. The setting suggests a professional and engaging discussion, with the event's branding prominently displayed on the screen.
